recipe.instructions: You are helping a park survey team prepare a terminal map. Create final-capstone-file-room-handoff-park-survey/requests and add final-capstone-file-room-handoff-park-survey/requests/north-trail.txt so the team has a concrete request log to hand off.

exercises.starterCode:
mkdir -p final-capstone-file-room-handoff-park-survey/requests
printf 'North trail request log\n' > final-capstone-file-room-handoff-park-survey/requests/north-trail.txt
ls final-capstone-file-room-handoff-park-survey
# Capstone step 2: Add the map notes folder
# Keep the working code above from the previous step.
# Next, Continue the same park survey workspace
# Add only the focused change for this step below or inside the existing work.
